dockLayouts.research::Fund:alpha-credit:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?>
<LayoutRoot>
  <RootPanel Orientation="Vertical">
    <LayoutPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
      <LayoutAnchorablePaneGroup Orientation="Horizontal" DockWidth="300">
        <LayoutAnchorablePane />
      </LayoutAnchorablePaneGroup>
      <LayoutDocumentPaneGroup Orientation="Horizontal">
        <LayoutDocumentPane />
      </LayoutDocumentPaneGroup>
      <LayoutAnchorablePaneGroup Orientation="Horizontal" DockWidth="340">
        <LayoutAnchorablePane />
      </LayoutAnchorablePaneGroup>
    </LayoutPanel>
    <LayoutAnchorablePaneGroup Orientation="Horizontal" DockHeight="240">
      <LayoutAnchorablePane DockHeight="240" />
    </LayoutAnchorablePaneGroup>
  </RootPanel>
  <TopSide />
  <RightSide />
  <LeftSide />
  <BottomSide />
  <FloatingWindows />
  <Hidden />
</LayoutRoot>
